commands.review_summary:
Adds Telegram group/topic streaming and ack-reaction overrides, documents/tests them, and changes main-session cron jobs with `delivery.mode: "none"` to skip assistant wake-up.

PR surface: Source +135, Tests +203, Docs +23. Total +361 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection shows the generated metadata drift and the cron wake behavior change, and the Mantis Telegram Desktop artifact for the candidate did not show the expected visible reply. I did not run the PR tests locally because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review is needed for the cron compatibility decision and for new passing Telegram proof; automation cannot provide the contributor/live proof gate for this PR.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
